description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the femtopixel/multiarchbuilder Docker image with a docker:dind service and set DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375. Define a single build stage and a build job that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script, run `docker run --rm --privileged multiarch/qemu-user-static:register --reset`; clone the manifest-tool repository, checkout v0.9.0, build and install it with `make` and `make install`; clone the qemu-static-conf repository and copy its *.conf files into /lib/binfmt.d; and log in to Docker Hub using the $DOCKER_HUB_LOGIN and $DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD variables. Then execute `make` in the script step.
